caption: An elderly man with white hair and glasses stands behind a wooden podium, speaking into a black microphone. He is wearing a light blue button-down shirt featuring an embroidered pattern of birds and a colorful lanyard around his neck. In front of him, a small white sign on the podium displays a red logo and the text "SPOKANE PUBLIC LIBRARY". To the right of the podium, a white graphic overlay reads "ORCA". The man is viewed from a slightly low angle, with the back of several people's heads visible in the foreground, suggesting an audience. The background consists of light-brown wood-paneled walls with vertical blue accents. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his head and gaze slightly, appearing to read from notes or a script on the podium while continuing to address the crowd.
